name: Cnova N.V.
summary: Cnova N.V. operates as an e-commerce company in France and Western Europe. The company offers home appliances, consumer electronics, computers, home furnishings, and leisure and personal goods through its cdiscount.com Website, as well as through Cdiscount's showrooms. It also operates Cdiscount Voyages, a travel platform; Cdiscount Billetterie, a ticketing platform; Cdiscount Energie for home energy; Cdiscount Mobile for cell phone plans; and Cdiscount Immobilier, a real estate platform. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Amsterdam, the Netherlands. Cnova N.V. is a subsidiary of Casino, Guichard-Perrachon S.A.
